name: IonQ, Inc.
description: IonQ, Inc. is a leader in quantum computing, with a proven track record of innovation and product delivery. IonQ's generation of quantum computers, IonQ Forte, is the latest in a line of cutting-edge systems, boasting 36 algorithmic qubits. IonQ is the only company with its quantum systems available through the cloud on Amazon Braket, Microsoft Azure, and Google Cloud, as well as through direct API access. IonQ was founded in 2015 by Christopher Monroe and Jungsang Kim based on 25 years of pioneering research.
